label: 1507 CE
era_summary: Year 1507 (MDVII) was a common year starting on Friday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Brecke records no major conflicts touching this region in 1507 (safety scored at the era baseline of 85). No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

andalusia_iberia.summary: Active conflicts in 1507: Morocco-Portugal, 1505-14; Portugal-Persia (Hormuz), 1507; Portugal-Egypt (Red Sea), 1507. Maddison records GDP/capita 1315 (ESP, 1507) — used as the economy proxy for the whole region. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
